reviews.author: Stanzin Angchuk
reviews.text: Great if you want to go to the peak of Langbiang 50k entrance fee you can run up the trails. Marking is decent and you will not get lost.

reviews.author: Scott Hiller
reviews.text: Fantastic area for trekking with a variety of mini ecosystems to experience. Be prepared for leeches and unpredictable weather. The terrain can be challenging with several water crossings with fast moving currents.

reviews.author: Jacob
reviews.text: The waterfall hike through the lush forest is absolutely stunning. Well-marked trails make navigation easy, and the 3km walk to Thien Thai waterfall is manageable for most fitness levels. The park entrance fee is very reasonable. Best visited on a sunny day to fully appreciate the pristine natural surroundings. A must-visit for anyone seeking adventure in nature.

reviews.author: Ned Peglar
reviews.text: 🚨 there are no taxis/grabs 🚨 we stupidly got a grab from Da Lat city centre to Bidoup National park for the waterfall hike. obviously when we tried to return to Da Lat city centre there were no grabs available. we googled nearby taxi services and TAXI LADO ĐÀ LẠT came up. unable to call (due to our sim card giving us only data but no calls), we arranged for the park reception to call TAXI LADO ĐÀ LẠT and arrange a taxi back to city centre. MAKE SURE YOU BRING YOUR OWN BIKE or arrange and online tour beforehand, don’t make the mistake we did! overall, waterfall is nice but quite small. what i loved about this place is its way wayy less touristy than all the other places, especially Lang Biang which is horrendous.

reviews.author: Huyen Tran
reviews.text: We went to the Thien Thai waterfall. The route is very straightforward, about 3.2km walking in total. Took us 3 hours to finish the trail. Very nice trail, easy to walk through. Better if you go in a sunny day. Not recommended for young children and elderly, since we have to cross the river at some point. Ticket is 40k per person. Totally recommended. They have other trail for longer time (over a day). You can contact them for more info.

reviews.author: Cameron Appleyard
reviews.text: If you are looking to camp: there is not much info online, but if you drive to this spot you will find the visitor centre. Here you can buy entry tickets to the park and be told where you can camp nearby. We were escorted by someone working there and it all worked well. There is also a nice 1 hour walk to a waterfall about 400 metres away.

reviews.author: Rentabike Vietnam
reviews.text: We took the trek to the waterfall and it was great. We felt like we were getting a bit lost at one point but we were never really to far from the track. Nice walk.

reviews.author: Hậu Trần Thiện
reviews.text: Nice place for trekking, we did little waterfall trek which is 1:30 hrs in total but it was worth it. The surrounding nature is just astounding and fantastic, definitely will come back.

reviews.author: Dg Khoa (BigCatDgk)
reviews.text: Nice place to camp and trek. Wonderful view and good service. Price to enter is 50k and 50k for camping per night. Camping place have toilet and place to make a camp fire.

reviews.author: Phat Vu
reviews.text: Great place for trekking and sightseeing ❤️❤️❤️ should book your tour in advance to enjoy the park safety. Tổ Ong Adventure is highly recommended.

reviews.author: theaDa ShaDa
reviews.text: Were here in February. At first it was great. Very nice place and fresh air. After the hot coast, the place seemed like paradise. We immediately wanted to spend the night in one of the houses that we saw while walking around the territory. But we came here to walk to the waterfall we read about, so we went there. When we returned to the lake where the villas stood, we realized that there was a loud rumble in the air, which did not stop while we looking at the houses. It was weird, noisy, like we were in an industrial area. As a result, after walking for about an hour, we changed our minds about staying, as we came here to listen to the forest and birdsong. I do not recommend for lovers of quiet places who want to take a break from the city.

reviews.author: rinji kuhouon
reviews.text: Wonderful place to have a little picnic, camping or trekking within 2 km form the entrance to Thien Thai waterfall, it's recommended to go around summer and be sure to have essential items

reviews.author: Hanh M. Nguyen
reviews.text: An excellent getaway! Their trails are a bit demanding but the fresh air worth the sweat! Do bring your own water and food, and please take the trash home with you.

reviews.author: Tung Le
reviews.text: Wonderful place! Waking up here with the sound of the wind blowing through the forest is the best way to start a day

reviews.author: Игорь
reviews.text: Amazing nature. Nice houses. Hot water ! Very good. The best place for retreat and meditation with yoga

reviews.author: The Swaggie
reviews.text: Hidden Gem. Rent a scooter and just go! There is a Park Office that will explain the tracks. Level T2

reviews.author: Mull k vang Monom
reviews.text: Great detonation for Ecotourism and environment education. Highly recommended for your Dalat trip.

reviews.author: Vĩnh Nhân Huỳnh
reviews.text: A beautiful memory for me and our team, love Bidoup too much :)

reviews.author: Reginald Williams
reviews.text: Though we were only able to drive through parts of the park due to drenching rain and hail it was apparent that this is a vast natural wonderland worthy of further exploration. Our guest house host kindly recommended two different waterfalls in the park accessible within 2-3 hours of trail entrance. I’m sure there are many more.

reviews.author: Vu Phuong Nguyen
reviews.text: Best place for day hike or refresh your mind in nature

reviews.author: Marcus Neville
reviews.text: This is one of the best national parks I’ve been to in a long long while. It is unbelievably beautiful and you can just walk into it free of charge if you go in at the right places. Beware of walking through miles of strawberry and flower farms though

reviews.author: quocphong le
reviews.text: Good quiet place , good weather , fresh air

reviews.author: Q N
reviews.text: Great trail but not for the beginner.

reviews.author: Ken 2038
reviews.text: It's such an interesting experience that I never forget.

reviews.author: Danh Bui
reviews.text: Very beautiful place to visit and relax with your family. Big room with 5 smaller bedrooms inside, can sleep up to 14 people. No stove or refrigerator inside. The scenary is awesome, beautiful, untouched by human. Worth a visit. It was raining hard so I was not able to go deeper into the wood, but will come back next time for the hike to the jungle.

reviews.author: Đan Khánh Trần
reviews.text: Great atmosphere, an ideal place for Hiking

reviews.author: Addie Tacadena
reviews.text: Awesome place! The accommodations here are almost new and very modern. Very reasonably priced. It was peaceful to wake up in the mountains in a sea of fog. Nearby eats is about 5km away. Do the heavens pass bike ride to nha trang!

reviews.author: Emil Waldhauser
reviews.text: A tranquil place with amazing trails and helpful staff.

reviews.author: Thanh Huynh Kim
reviews.text: A very nice (national) forest. Got to experience hiking and loads of other insightful info about nature. The tour guide was caring and funny too. Reccomended.
